beats: 近景：装配工位前浮起一圈全息数据环，等宽字体显示装配参数——压装力、同心度、密封
一条历史趋势条亮起琥珀色，某项参数连日缓慢上行
王巡检抬手轻点，确认通过此项，AI 记下一笔

voiceover.speaker: 澄
voiceover.text: 卷绕张力，这几天悄悄紧了一点。我替你记下了——别的都稳，一项一项过。

prompt.positive: 16:9 cinematic close-up with shallow depth of field; a floating holographic data ring at the membrane Winding Station (卷制工位), monospaced numerals for winding tension, adhesive bead and concentricity in primary blue (#4a8eff); one amber (#f59e0b) history trend bar for winding tension creeping upward over days; the inspector blue-suited hand taps to confirm; screen-free, soft even light, photorealistic, 8K
prompt.negative: physical display screens, wall monitors, cyberpunk neon, bulky VR headset, cluttered background, cartoon, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, dark lighting
